windows.embed_text_v2: placing bamboo lids on two finished pink container candles in clear glass jars, solid pink wax, tattooed hand handling them on a dark metal baking tray; capping and inspecting jar candles
windows.summary_v2: Two finished pink container candles in glass jars are capped with bamboo lids and handled on a dark baking tray.

tags_v2.action: capping and handling finished jar candles with bamboo lids
tags_v2.setting: dark metal baking tray on counter
tags_v2.on_screen_text: small red product label on jar

seconds_v2.desc: Two finished pink container candles in clear glass jars with bamboo lids sit on a dark metal baking tray; a tattooed hand presses the lids down onto both jars.
The hand adjusts the right jar's bamboo lid; a small red label is visible on its side, the solid pink wax filling both glasses.
Hand reaches across the tops of both lidded pink candles, fingertip resting on the bamboo lids as the jars stand side by side.
The hand withdraws; the two capped pink candles in glass jars with wood lids sit on the tray, solid pink wax with a slightly translucent top band.
Static view of the two finished pink candles, bamboo lids seated on the clear jars on the dark tray.
The camera holds on the pair of lidded pink container candles, light catching the glass and the pink wax surface beneath the lids.
Both jars remain capped with bamboo lids, the smooth solid pink wax visible through the clear glass on the metal tray.
Continued view of the two finished pink candles side by side with their wooden lids on the baking tray.
The tattooed hand returns and grips the left jar by its bamboo lid, lifting/tilting it toward the camera while the right candle stays on the tray.
